description: Fresh review on a story that has never been reviewed
expected_behavior: Set reviewed=in-progress, run all prechecks (build, lint, type-check, format-check, unit-tests, e2e-tests), dispatch all agents (design-review, code-review, code-review-testing, performance-benchmark, security-review, exploratory-qa), populate gates array with results

description: Resume an interrupted review that has some gates already passed
expected_behavior: Re-run prechecks (code may have changed), skip code-review agent (already passed), run remaining agents (design-review, code-review-testing, performance-benchmark, security-review, exploratory-qa), merge all results

description: Story already marked as reviewed=true, re-running forces full review
expected_behavior: Reset to reviewed=in-progress, clear review_gates_passed, update review_started timestamp, run full review from scratch

description: Pre-check (build) fails, stops before dispatching agents
expected_behavior: Run prechecks, build gate FAILS, STOP before dispatching any agents, keep reviewed=in-progress, report which precheck failed with actionable error

description: No UI files in diff, design-review and exploratory-qa should be skipped
expected_behavior: Run prechecks, skip design-review agent (add design-review-skipped), skip exploratory-qa agent (add exploratory-qa-skipped), run code-review, code-review-testing, security-review agents, validate gates accepts -skipped variants

description: E2E spec exists with test anti-patterns detected, offer burn-in testing
expected_behavior: Run prechecks, detect anti-patterns in tests, present AskUserQuestion offering burn-in testing (10 iterations) as recommended option, user accepts → run burn-in, user declines → continue without burn-in

description: Agent returns BLOCKER finding, verdict is BLOCKED, reviewed stays in-progress

findings.description: SQL injection vulnerability in query builder

expected_behavior: Agent result collected with BLOCKER finding, verdict=BLOCKED, reviewed stays in-progress, report lists BLOCKER prominently, gate validation fails, user must fix and re-run
